entities.conductor: a conductor in a black tuxedo
entities.violinist: a young woman with a violin
entities.cellist: an older man with a cello

scenes.title: The Orchestra
scenes.background_prompt: A concert hall stage with rows of empty chairs, music stands with sheet music, a conductor's podium, and warm stage lighting. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A concert hall stage under warm golden lighting. A conductor in a black tuxedo and white bow tie stands on a raised wooden podium, one arm lifted high holding a baton mid-gesture. To his left in the front row, a young woman with her dark hair in a neat bun holds a violin tucked under her chin, her bow poised on the strings, eyes locked on the conductor. To the right, an older man with gray hair and wire-rimmed glasses sits behind a large wooden cello, his left hand pressing the fingerboard and his right drawing the bow across the strings. Other chairs and music stands fill the background, some with instruments resting on them. Heavy red velvet curtains frame the stage, and the polished wooden floor reflects the stage lights.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place conductor on the raised podium (center), standing with one arm lifted holding a baton mid-gesture. Place violinist in the front row to his left, seated, holding violin under chin with bow on strings, eyes on conductor. Place cellist to the right, seated behind a large cello, left hand on fingerboard, right hand drawing bow.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground on the left side of a wooden stage, a violinist with black hair tied in a ponytail sits on a brown wooden chair, wearing a long-sleeved black dress with a white collar and black shoes. She holds a brown violin against her shoulder and a bow in her right hand, positioned behind a music stand holding open sheet music. To her left and behind her are several empty brown wooden chairs and another music stand. In the center of the stage, a conductor with short brown hair stands on a small rectangular wooden podium. He is dressed in a black tuxedo with tails, a white dress shirt, and a black bowtie. He holds a thin wooden baton in his raised right hand while his left hand is open and raised in a conducting gesture. To his left and right are more empty brown wooden chairs and music stands. On the right side of the stage, a cellist with curly brown hair sits on a brown wooden chair, wearing a black suit, white shirt, and black tie. He holds a large brown cello between his knees and a bow in his right hand, with a music stand holding sheet music in front of him. Behind him are additional empty brown wooden chairs and a music stand. The stage floor is light brown wood with a dark brown curved edge at the very front. In the midground, the stage is framed by large ornate green and brown pillars on the left and right. Behind the performers, heavy red and orange curtains are draped in an archway, revealing light blue vertical panels in the very back. In the background, on both the left and right sides, there are elevated wooden balconies with green trim. Behind these balconies and in the far distance, rows of theater seating are filled with colorful, simplified silhouettes of an audience in shades of red, blue, and purple. The architecture of the theater features ornate brown and green moldings and a dark ceiling, creating the atmosphere of an indoor evening concert hall.
